parameters.name: x-import-dry-run
parameters.description: When true, validates and summarises the import without persisting anything. Defaults to false.

schema.description: When true, validates and summarises the import without persisting anything. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: x-import-mode
parameters.description: Whether to merge (default) or replace existing workspace config.

schema.description: How an import treats workspace entities that are not present in the imported file.
schema.title: ImportMode

parameters.name: x-import-on-error
parameters.description: Whether to abort (default) or continue on per-entity errors.

schema.description: How an import reacts when an individual entity fails to apply.
schema.title: ImportOnError

parameters.name: x-import-overwrite
parameters.description: When false, entities that already exist are skipped instead of updated. Defaults to true.

schema.description: When false, entities that already exist are skipped instead of updated. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: x-import-value-merge
parameters.description: When true, deep-merges object-valued default-configs with the existing value. Defaults to false.

schema.description: When true, deep-merges object-valued default-configs with the existing value. Defaults to false.
